user_message: I need you to process this meeting transcript from Pacific Northwest Outfitters. We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-13 11:11 EST
Subject: URGENT: forecast prep Issue at Pacific Northwest Outfitters

Our team encountered some challenges with forecast prep. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 08:22 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Pacific Northwest Outfitters forecast prep

There's been a change in our timeline for forecast prep. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-14 15:31 EST
Subject: Re: forecast prep Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about forecast prep. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Pacific Northwest Outfitters: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-M trap (No native 'champion-change motion' in skill set); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-M failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-M failure mode (No native 'champion-change motion' in skill set)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
